findings.description: exc_info=True contradicted 'type only' comment — security boundary was stderr vs operator logs, not total suppression
findings.proposedRule: P45: CWE-532 trust boundary clarity — comments MUST specify exact boundary (operator logs vs user stderr)

findings.description: MeterProvider reset logic duplicated 5x across 3 files — maintenance risk when OTel SDK changes
findings.proposedRule: P46: Test fixtures call reset_telemetry() directly, never duplicate private API manipulation

findings.description: TracerProvider and MeterProvider have different null-safety semantics in reset — None vs fresh proxy
findings.proposedRule: P47: OTel reset asymmetry — verify proxy restoration per provider type independently

findings.description: sys.exc_info()[1] replaced by except Exception as exc — simpler, removes import sys
isinstance() on typed module-level state flagged as redundant — simplified to is not None
